title: Help and shell readiness
objective: Improve help scoping and shell-readiness after parser migration.
description: Moves help toward command-scoped flags and documents shell completion readiness if supported.
parallel_safe_reason: Help scoping depends on final parser adapter behavior.
must: Scope help flags by command where possible.
Annotate command-scoped flags if global help still lists them.
Document shell completion readiness only if actually supported.
not_included: Generating shell completion unless explicitly supported by selected parser path.
acceptance: Help no longer misrepresents command-scoped flags.
validation_hints: Do not promise completion if it is not implemented.
